name: orchestrate
description: Multi-agent coding orchestrator for AI coding agents. Drives whole-codebase build/fix/audit/refactor work through a structured multi-stage planning lifecycle backed by a docs/ single source of truth the skill auto-maintains (evidence, findings, CHANGELOG, ROADMAP), an expanded subagent squad (explorer, implementer, verifier, UI runtime tester, DB prober), a project-independent browser-driven UI/UX test swarm (persona enrollment, data entry, fuzzing, an independent accuracy oracle, gated bug/user-story/feedback reporting), fail-safe automation hooks, and /orc-prompt to turn vague requests into structured, environment-aware specs.
